mapper.delete: DELETE FROM question WHERE subject = #{subject} AND model = #{model}
mapper.select: SELECT id, api_id, question, answer, item1, item2, item3, item4, explains, url, subject, model, question_type FROM question
SELECT id, api_id, question, answer, item1, item2, item3, item4, explains, url, subject, model, question_type FROM question WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET api_id = #{apiId}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, item1 = #{item1}, item2 = #{item2}, item3 = #{item3}, item4 = #{item4}, explains = #{explains}, url = #{url}, subject = #{subject}, model = #{model}, question_type = #{questionType} WHERE id = #{id}
